Short CV

She completed her undergraduate education at Yeditepe University, Faculty of Arts and Sciences, English Language and Literature, and her double major at the Faculty of Communication, Radio, Television and Cinema departments with a full scholarship. She has worked as a video director, assistant director, festival coordinator, simultaneous translator, assistant producer, English teacher, film critic, short film coordinator. In 2018, she completed her master's degree at Yeditepe University, Department of Radio, Television and Cinema with a full scholarship. In 2024, Besna Ağı Ergün successfully defended her doctoral thesis titled "Modern Epic Form as a Contemporary Cinema Language" at İstanbul University, Institute of Social Sciences, Department of Radio, Television and Cinema, Department of Cinema, and was awarded the title of Doctor.
